recommendations.title: Bloodsucking Bastards
recommendations.overview: A down on his luck cubicle worker and his slacker best friend discover their new boss is a vampire who is turning their coworkers into the un-dead.

recommendations.title: Into the Deep
recommendations.overview: Divers searching for sunken treasure witness the murder of drug dealers by modern-day pirates, but a killer great white is determined not to let any of them escape its waters.

recommendations.title: King of Killers
recommendations.overview: Garan is a part of a group of international hitmen who are contracted to take out the most dangerous killer in the world, only to find out that they're the ones being hunted.

recommendations.title: Rogue Warfare
recommendations.overview: A group of military elite from the U.S., Russia, UK, China and France join forces to fight an elite underground terrorist network.

recommendations.title: Samson
recommendations.overview: After losing the love of his life to a cruel Philistine prince, a young Hebrew with Supernatural strength defends his people, sacrificing everything to avenge his love, his people, and his God.

recommendations.title: The Shadow's Edge
recommendations.overview: Macau Police brings the tracking expert police officer out of retirement to help catch a dangerous group of professional thieves.

recommendations.title: Tiger House
recommendations.overview: A young gymnast battles a group of bank robbers at the home of her boyfriend.

recommendations.title: Ferry 2
recommendations.overview: After losing his drug empire, Ferry Bouman has found a measure of peace away from Brabant's criminal underworld — until his past catches up to him.

recommendations.title: High Heat
recommendations.overview: When the local mafia shows up to burn down her restaurant, Ana, a chef with a meticulous past, defends her turf and proves her knife skills both in and out of the kitchen.

recommendations.title: In the Blood
recommendations.overview: When her husband goes missing during their Caribbean vacation, a woman sets off on her own to take down the men she thinks are responsible.
